content.en:
It had been sixty thousand years since Ye Tian came out of the forbidden area of the Blood Sea, and he had accumulated six True Blood Fruits in his hands, but he did not take them immediately, but was ready to take the True Blood Fruit after cultivating the fourth layer of the Xuanxu Jue to the consummation realm, so that after the blood could be transformed into true blood, he would feed back to the physical body, and break the shackles of the physical body by taking advantage of the situation, so as to ascend to the fifth layer realm.

In this way, he would not need to be affected by the shackles, otherwise, if he was taking the True Blood Fruit now, he would still be trapped in the bottleneck shackles of the fourth to fifth layers of the Xuanxu Technique.

Of course.

Ye Tian's strength has also improved a lot, and although he is still at the ultimate power of the three-star god general, he has made up for it in all aspects.

Moreover, he had already comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram to the level of twenty-four percent, and had raised his state of mind to the eighth layer.

As for the Xuanxu Jue, he is still in the fourth layer of the Xuanxu Jue Xiaocheng realm, but he is at the peak of Xiaocheng, and he is only one step away from the Dacheng realm.

"It's time to go to the New Universe, what the hell is going on there?"

Ye Tian frowned.

In the past tens of thousands of years, although he has stayed in the forbidden area of the Blood Sea, the third and fourth deities still know some things, and the changes in the new universe have attracted the attention of countless powerhouses in the two universes of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe, and he naturally will not be unaware.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled away from the forbidden area of the Blood Sea and flew towards the direction of the new universe.

And when Ye Tian left, one by one the holy places in the Cangyu Universe got the news, and suddenly some gods rushed to the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone.

......

The New Universe, a centrally located area known as the Forbidden Realm!

Ye Tian came to the forbidden realm and did not attract the attention of others.

The rules of the forbidden realm are chaotic and powerful, and they currently exclude others from entering, not even the god generals.

"Can't you even get into the god general?"

Ye Tian was a little curious and tried to walk in.

But at the moment when he was about to enter, a terrible repulsion came, and in front of this repulsion, he seemed to be like an ant, unable to shake it at all.

Can't get in!

Yes, even he, the three-star ultimate god general, can't enter at all, no wonder this place is called a forbidden area.

"Strange, how could such a strange place be born in the universe?"

Ye Tian was curious.

It wouldn't be strange if such a place was created in the midst of chaos, but this is the universe!

It is impossible for the universe to produce too powerful things and status, and even places like the source are extremely magical, but they will not produce too terrifying creatures.

And some forbidden places in the universe are only for the earth lord, and it is the same thing for the god-level powerhouse, there may be restrictions, but it is impossible to give the three-star god general a feeling of ants.

After all, even the origin of the universe couldn't make Ye Tian feel like he was an ant, why did this mere forbidden domain make him feel like this?

"Something is wrong!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to study, but he still couldn't know the secrets of the forbidden domain, he only felt that the forbidden domain was getting stronger and stronger, and the scope of the impact was getting bigger and bigger.

However, Ye Tian found a way to cultivate.

He continued to squeeze into the forbidden realm, and while receiving the terrifying repulsion in the underworld, his physical body was under great pressure, and at this time, he used the Xuan Xuan Technique to cultivate, but the effect was more than ten times better.

So, Ye Tian continued to cultivate like this.

Of course, the energy consumed by this kind of cultivation method was very serious, but fortunately, Ye Tian had a lot of blood crystals in his hands, so he was not afraid of consumption.

This cultivation took tens of thousands of years!

On this day, Ye Tian suddenly broke the shackles, successfully cultivated the Xuanxuan Jue to the fourth layer of the Dacheng realm, and his physical body improved a little, thus breaking the shackles, and the strength of the whole person broke the shackles and stepped into the combat power of the four-star god general.

"Finally, the four-star god general!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, as the repulsion of the forbidden domain became more and more terrifying, with the strength of his four-star god general, he could not approach the forbidden domain at all, so naturally there was no way to use the forbidden domain to cultivate, otherwise it would be easy to hit hard.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't care about this anymore, his strength had been upgraded to a four-star god general, and he had already preliminarily completed his goal.

Moreover, if Ye Tian wants to be detached now, he can detach at any time.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian left the New Universe and returned to the Terran Territory of the Ancient Universe.

----------

After returning to the Terrans, Ye Tian gave a part of the blood crystals to the Terrans to enhance the strength of the Terrans, and some of the blood crystals were given to his wife and sister Ye Yu.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to practice retreat, but his progress was too slow.

In fact, his progress was already very fast, but the time given to him was too little, and he spent a lot of time contemplating the Void Heaven Diagram, which was the only way for him to become a disciple of the Void Heaven, and he couldn't give it up.

In addition, the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique must also speed up his cultivation, which is one of the ways for him to improve his comprehension!

Ten thousand years later, Ye Tian entered the Cangyu Universe again, forcibly entered the Ancient Demon Cave, and broke into the Ancient Demon Tower.

Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, his physical body became very powerful, coupled with his superb combat skills, he finally broke through the fifth and sixth layers of the Ancient Demon Tower in one fell swoop, and used the pure ancient demon essence yuan rewarded by the fifth and sixth layers to make his physical body stronger, and the Xuan Xuan Jue was also promoted from the fourth layer of the Dacheng realm to the fourth layer of the peak realm of the Dacheng, which was only one step away from the fourth layer of consummation.

After returning from the Ancient Demon Tower, Ye Tian went to the New Universe again and investigated the forbidden domain again, and at this time, the rules of the forbidden domain began to stabilize.

It seems that the whole forbidden area has begun a new change!

Many gods will speculate that the true face of the forbidden realm may be revealed, and if the forbidden realm is a place of chance, it is definitely the most precious place of chance ever, and it may be enough to make the gods crazy.

Thousands of years passed, and the rules of the forbidden realm were completely stabilized.

Then.

In a giant city next to the forbidden realm, that is, in the newly built forbidden capital, many gods and generals live here, waiting for the change of the forbidden realm.

And Ye Tian is also among them.

Suddenly.

The entire new universe shook, wisps of terrifying rules were born, and the entire new universe seemed to be imprisoned, and even Ye Tian couldn't move.

Then.

Rays of light shone in all directions, penetrating the new universe, covering the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe, and all the places in the two universes could not stop this light.

Chaos God Realm.

The Ox Clans all looked at the penetrating light and were dumbfounded.

What kind of world is the Chaos God Realm, even if the dimensional world is unified, the Chaos God Realm can still be hidden, but now the light of the forbidden domain has actually penetrated the Chaos God Realm.

If you look at it from the chaos, you will find that the light released from the center of the two universes, covering the dark chaos, and the light continues to spread, extending into the depths of chaos.

Outside the chaos, the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm and the True Spirit Realm of the Tibetan God Organization stationed here were all dumbfounded, looking at the dual universe in disbelief.

At this moment, the Tibetan God True Monarch, who had never appeared in a long retreat, also appeared.

"Meet the Chief!"

"Meet the Chief!"

"Meet the Chief!"

One after another, the Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses and other True Spirit Realm True Monarchs shouted one after another.

"Chief, what's going on?" asked the Troubled Sea True Monarch in confusion.

As a registered disciple of the Great Power of the Dao, the Tibetan God True Monarch naturally saw far from being comparable to other True Monarchs, and he stared at the Twin Universes and quickly had a guess.

I saw him sigh and say, "This two universes no longer belong to us, order the members of the Tibetan God Organization to quickly withdraw from this area, and only a few people will be stationed here!"

"Why?"

Ranhai Zhenjun and the others were shocked.

"Because this opportunity is too big, even more than a big universe, it's not something we can covet, if I stay here, it will be easy to be destroyed by other big forces, and even my identity can't keep the Tibetan God Organization. If I'm not mistaken, this light comes from the ancestral monument, and it is a newly bred ancestral monument!"

Tibetan God True Monarch Dao.

"What is an ancestral monument?"

Ranhai Zhenjun and the others were confused one by one, and asked again.
